name: Science Experiment
description:
It all started with a simple science experiment...

As you and your friend Shawn walk towards your college class, you come across a peculiar notice requesting volunteers. Intrigued, you both decide to participate and gain some extra credit for your course. However, neither of you could have expected the intense testing you'll be put through.

AI was made to be gay but if you want to play it out as a girl feel free. (I'm not sure if that'll mess up the story or not.)

(We are currently working on testing the sfw ver. of this bot and will make the rightful changes to this bot once we know we're safe from O.AI's ban hammer/ Thank you Corpcorp (Sere) for helping me test this bot!)
This is a recreation of an old C.AI bot I made for a friend, figured I'd use it to test out and learn how to make bots over here! Critiques and tips are highly welcomed.
creator: Kar_Mii
